mapper.update:
UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0303-03_1#Sql002 */ FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER FCO
FCO.ACCEPT_ORDER_NO = #{req.acceptOrderNo}, FCO.ACCEPT_ORDER_SUB_NO = #{req.acceptOrderSubNo}, FCO.ORDER_DATE = #{req.orderDate}, FCO.ORDER_TIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{req.orderTime},'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') , FCO.TRADE_LIMIT_DATE = #{req.tradeLimitDate}, FCO.API_ERROR_CODE = null, FCO.API_STATUS_CODE = #{req.apiStatusCode}, FCO.API_MESSAGE = null, FCO.UPDATE_USER = #{req.updateUser}, FCO.UPDATE_TIME = SYSDATE
FCO.API_ERROR_CODE = #{req.apiErrorCode}, FCO.API_STATUS_CODE = #{req.apiStatusCode}, FCO.API_MESSAGE = SubStr(#{req.apiMsg},1,100), FCO.UPDATE_USER = #{req.updateUser}, FCO.UPDATE_TIME = SYSDATE
FCO.IFA_ORDER_NO = #{req.ifaOrderNo} AND FCO.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = #{req.ifaOrderSubNo}
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0303-03_1#Sql003 */ IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, INVITATION_TYPE, ORDER_METHOD_TYPE, EXPLANATION_INFO_TYPE, ENG_PUB_BRAND_EXP_TYPE FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER WHERE ACCEPT_ORDER_NO = #{req.acceptOrderNo} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO=( SELECT MAX(IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER WHERE ACCEPT_ORDER_NO = #{req.acceptOrderNo} )
SELECT TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') AS IFA_ORDER_NO FROM DUAL
